typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		EMPLID as string,
		EMPLID_INT as string,
		NAME as string,
		NAME_LNFN as string,
		LAST_NAME as string,
		FIRST_NAME as string,
		EMAIL_ID as string,
		ELID as string,
		MANAGER_FLG as string,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID as string,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT EMPLID     , to_number(EMPLID) EMPLID_INT     , PREF_FIRST_NAME || \' \' || PREF_LAST_NAME NAME     , PREF_LAST_NAME || \', \' || PREF_FIRST_NAME NAME_LNFN     , PREF_LAST_NAME LAST_NAME     , PREF_FIRST_NAME FIRST_NAME     , EMAIL_ID     , ELID_NW ELID     , MANAGER_FLG     , RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID     , RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL  FROM DISTRIBUTION.VW_CORE_COMMON  WHERE (SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID = \'00001845457\' OR EMPLID = \'00001845457\' or  EMPLID = \'00002115460\' or SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID = \'00002115460\' )',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource derive(Import_date = currentDate(),
		EMPLOYEEID_INT = toLong(EMPLID_INT),
		EID = toString(EMPLID),
		NM = toString(NAME)) ~> ImportDate
ImportDate derive({Copy of LAST_NAME} = toString(LAST_NAME),
		{Copy of EMPLOYEEID_INT} = EMPLOYEEID_INT,
		{Copy of RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL} = toString(RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL),
		{Copy of EMPLID} = toString(EMPLID),
		{Copy of MANAGER_FLG} = toString(MANAGER_FLG),
		{Copy of NAME_LNFN} = toString(NAME_LNFN),
		{Copy of FIRST_NAME} = toString(FIRST_NAME),
		{Copy of NAME} = toString(NAME),
		{Copy of ELID} = toString(ELID),
		{Copy of EMAIL_ID} = toString(EMAIL_ID),
		{Copy of RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID} = toString(RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion sink(input(
		Copy_of_MANAGER_FLG as string,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL as string,
		LAST_NAME as string,
		FIRST_NAME as string,
		Copy_of_RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID as string,
		EMPLOYEEID_INT as long,
		Copy_of_EMPLOYEEID_INT as long,
		Copy_of_RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL as string,
		Import_date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		EMPLID_INT as string,
		NAME_LNFN as string,
		EMPLID as string,
		Copy_of_EMPLID as string,
		EID as string,
		ELID as string,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID as string,
		Copy_of_FIRST_NAME as string,
		Copy_of_ELID as string,
		NAME as string,
		Copy_of_NAME_LNFN as string,
		Copy_of_LAST_NAME as string,
		MANAGER_FLG as string,
		Copy_of_EMAIL_ID as string,
		EMAIL_ID as string,
		Copy_of_NAME as string,
		NM as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Copy_of_MANAGER_FLG = {Copy of MANAGER_FLG},
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL,
		LAST_NAME,
		FIRST_NAME,
		Copy_of_RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID = {Copy of RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID},
		EMPLOYEEID_INT,
		Copy_of_EMPLOYEEID_INT = {Copy of EMPLOYEEID_INT},
		Copy_of_RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL = {Copy of RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL},
		Import_date,
		EMPLID_INT,
		NAME_LNFN,
		EMPLID,
		Copy_of_EMPLID = {Copy of EMPLID},
		EID,
		ELID,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID,
		Copy_of_FIRST_NAME = {Copy of FIRST_NAME},
		Copy_of_ELID = {Copy of ELID},
		NAME,
		Copy_of_NAME_LNFN = {Copy of NAME_LNFN},
		Copy_of_LAST_NAME = {Copy of LAST_NAME},
		MANAGER_FLG,
		Copy_of_EMAIL_ID = {Copy of EMAIL_ID},
		EMAIL_ID,
		Copy_of_NAME = {Copy of NAME},
		NM)) ~> FlatFileDestination
